title: astragalus lentiginosus var. araneosus
intro: Astragalus lentiginosus var. araneosus, also known as the desert milkvetch, is a plant species native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. It is a perennial herb with medicinal properties, traditionally used to treat various health conditions. The root of the desert milkvetch is believed to have adaptogenic and immunomodulatory effects, helping to boost the immune system and reduce stress. Herbal preparations of Astragalus lentiginosus var. araneosus can be found in the form of capsules, tinctures, or teas, and are used to promote overall health and well-being, particularly in the treatment of respiratory issues and fatigue.
